concerns.text: SC-013 states null percentage < 1% but maintainer decision specified ≤ 5% per field. This creates internal inconsistency between the documented requirement and the resolution decision. Quantify all three metrics consistently: null percentage ≤ 5% per field, format pass rate ≥ 99%, duplicate records = 0 (0%).

FR-005 states residuals '≥ 2 standard deviations from the global mean' but SC-011 correctly states '≥ 2 standard deviations from the fitted trend'. Per maintainer decision, FR-005 should reference model predictions (fitted trend), not global mean. Residuals are measured from model predictions by definition.
